title: Keyset pagination over a joined + filtered query
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.category_feed/2` that returns cursor-paginated posts within a specific category. Takes `category_id` and an optional `{ts, id}` cursor. Inner-join category, filter by `^category_id`, apply row-wise keyset cursor on `(inserted_at desc, id desc)`, return 20 rows. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Cursor + joined filter + multi-pin. Requires understanding both the filter and the keyset at once.
